by_type.map: function (doc) { if (doc.type === 'room' || doc.type === 'storageEquipment' || doc.type === 'container' || doc.type === 'inventoryItem' || doc.type === 'inventoryTemplate') { emit(doc.type, null); } }

by_parent.map: function (doc) { if ((doc.type === 'storageEquipment' || doc.type === 'container' || doc.type === 'inventoryItem') && doc.parentId) { emit([doc.parentType || null, doc.parentId], null); } }

by_room.map: function (doc) { if (!(doc.type === 'room' || doc.type === 'storageEquipment' || doc.type === 'container' || doc.type === 'inventoryItem')) { return; } if (doc.type === 'room') { emit(doc._id, null); return; } var roomId = null; if (doc.locationPath && doc.locationPath.length) { for (var i = 0; i < doc.locationPath.length; i++) { var ancestor = doc.locationPath[i]; if (ancestor && ancestor.type === 'room' && ancestor.id) { roomId = ancestor.id; break; } } } if (!roomId && doc.parentType === 'room' && doc.parentId) { roomId = doc.parentId; } if (roomId) { emit(roomId, null); } }

by_ancestor.map: function (doc) { if (!(doc.type === 'storageEquipment' || doc.type === 'container' || doc.type === 'inventoryItem')) { return; } if (doc.locationPath && doc.locationPath.length) { for (var i = 0; i < doc.locationPath.length; i++) { var ancestor = doc.locationPath[i]; if (ancestor && ancestor.id) { emit([ancestor.type || null, ancestor.id], null); } } } if (doc.parentId) { emit([doc.parentType || null, doc.parentId], null); } }

by_expiry.map: function (doc) { if (doc.type !== 'inventoryItem') { return; } var expiry = doc.expiryDate || null; if (expiry) { emit(expiry, null); } }

by_barcode.map: function (doc) { var metadata = doc.metadata || {}; var barcode = doc.barcode || metadata.barcode || metadata.qrCode || null; if ((doc.type === 'room' || doc.type === 'storageEquipment' || doc.type === 'container' || doc.type === 'inventoryItem') && barcode) { emit(barcode, null); } }

by_category.map: function (doc) { if (doc.type === 'inventoryItem') { emit(doc.category || 'other', null); return; } if (doc.type === 'container') { emit(doc.classification || doc.containerType || 'other', null); return; } if (doc.type === 'storageEquipment') { emit(doc.equipmentType || 'other', null); } }

templates_by_kind.map: function (doc) { if (doc.type === 'inventoryTemplate') { emit([doc.templateFor || null, doc.containerType || null], null); } }
